TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Kim_Go-eun, title = Kim_Go-eun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kim_Go-eun} }

S.FORM: == Cinkawyin == u siwkay niza Cinkawyin, upalaway nu Korea kanatal. namueneng i China katukuh cacay a bataan a mihca. sisa matineng musakamu nu China a kamu. 2012 mihca tahkal ciniza mipalaw ku "Lolita-idang" a iga. maala tu tabakiay a kawlah. 2016 a mihca, mipalaw aca tu"sinaadaay a Dietu", manamuh ku taw tu cinizaan. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ÂæÖË£úÂÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Kim Go-eun (born July 2, 1991) is a South Korean actress. She debuted in the critically acclaimed film A Muse (2012) where she won several Best New Actress awards in South Korea. She next appeared in the crime thrillers Monster (2014), Coin Locker Girl (2015) and Memories of the Sword (2015). Kim then extended her filmography to television where she played leading roles in the tvN dramas Cheese in the Trap (2016) and Guardian: The Lonely and Great God (2016-2017). u sulit nu Lipun „Ç≠„ÉÝ„Éª„Ç¥„Ç¶„É≥(ÍπÄÍ≥ÝÏùÄ,Kim Go Eun,1991Âπ¥7Êúà2Êó• - )„ÅØÈüìÂõΩ„ÅÆ‰ø≥ÂÑ™. u kawlah niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ÂæÖË£úÂÖÖ) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ÂæÖË£úÂÖÖ)
S.PHON: == ¶inkawjin == u siwkaj niza ¶inkawjin, upar~…æawaj nu kor…ôa kanatar~…æ. namu…ôn…ô≈ã i ¶ƒßina katukuƒß ¶a ¶aj a bataan a miƒß ¶a. sisa matin…ô≈ã musakamu nu ¶ƒßina a kamu. **** miƒß ¶a taƒßkar~…æ ¶iniza mipar~…æaw ku "r~…æor~…æita-ida≈ã" a iga. maar~…æa tu tabakiaj a kawr~…æaƒß. **** a miƒß ¶a, mipar~…æaw a ¶a tu"sinaadaaj a di…ôtu", manamuƒß ku taw tu ¶inizaan. (ami ¶unus ƒß…ônaj tu sur~…æit.***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam kim go-…ôun (born *ur~…æj *, ****) is a soutƒß kor…ôan a ¶tr…ôss. sƒß…ô d…ôbut…ôd in tƒß…ô ¶riti ¶ar~…ær~…æj a ¶ ¶r~…æaim…ôd fir~…æm a mus…ô (****) wƒß…ôr…ô sƒß…ô won s…ô*…ôrar~…æ b…ôst n…ôw a ¶tr…ôss awards in soutƒß kor…ôa. sƒß…ô n…ô*t app…ôar…ôd in tƒß…ô ¶rim…ô tƒßrir~…ær~…æ…ôrs monst…ôr (****), ¶oin r~…æo ¶k…ôr girr~…æ (****) and m…ômori…ôs of tƒß…ô sword (****). kim tƒß…ôn …ô*t…ônd…ôd ƒß…ôr fir~…æmograpƒßj to t…ôr~…æ…ô*ision wƒß…ôr…ô sƒß…ô pr~…æaj…ôd r~…æ…ôadi≈ã ror~…æ…ôs in tƒß…ô t*n dramas ¶ƒß…ô…ôs…ô in tƒß…ô trap (****) and guardian: tƒß…ô r~…æon…ôr~…æj and gr…ôat god (****-****). u sur~…æit nu r~…æipun ******(***,kim go …ôun,********* - )******. u kawr~…æaƒß niza (ami ¶unus ƒß…ônaj tu sur~…æit.***) u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ƒß…ônaj tu sur~…æit.***)
S.FORM: == Cinkawyin == u siwkay niza Cinkawyin, upalaway nu Korea kanatal. namueneng i China katukuh cacay a bataan a mihca. sisa matineng musakamu nu China a kamu. 2012 mihca tahkal ciniza mipalaw ku "Lolita-idang" a iga. maala tu tabakiay a kawlah. 2016 a mihca, mipalaw aca tu"sinaadaay a Dietu", manamuh ku taw tu cinizaan. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ÂæÖË£úÂÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Kim Go-eun (born July 2, 1991) is a South Korean actress. She debuted in the critically acclaimed film A Muse (2012) where she won several Best New Actress awards in South Korea. She next appeared in the crime thrillers Monster (2014), Coin Locker Girl (2015) and Memories of the Sword (2015). Kim then extended her filmography to television where she played leading roles in the tvN dramas Cheese in the Trap (2016) and Guardian: The Lonely and Great God (2016-2017). u sulit nu Lipun „Ç≠„ÉÝ„Éª„Ç¥„Ç¶„É≥(ÍπÄÍ≥ÝÏùÄ,Kim Go Eun,1991Âπ¥7Êúà2Êó• - )„ÅØÈüìÂõΩ„ÅÆ‰ø≥ÂÑ™. u kawlah niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ÂæÖË£úÂÖÖ) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ÂæÖË£úÂÖÖ)

(ami ¶unus ƒß…ônaj tu sur~…æit.***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…æit nu ƒßur~…æam kim go-…ôun (born *ur~…æj *, ****) is a soutƒß kor…ôan a ¶tr…ôss. sƒß…ô d…ôbut…ôd in tƒß…ô ¶riti ¶ar~…ær~…æj a ¶ ¶r~…æaim…ôd fir~…æm a mus…ô (****) wƒß…ôr…ô sƒß…ô won s…ô*…ôrar~…æ b…ôst n…ôw a ¶tr…ôss awards in soutƒß kor…ôa. sƒß…ô n…ô*t app…ôar…ôd in tƒß…ô ¶rim…ô tƒßrir~…ær~…æ…ôrs monst…ôr (****), ¶oin r~…æo ¶k…ôr girr~…æ (****) and m…ômori…ôs of tƒß…ô sword (****). kim tƒß…ôn …ô*t…ônd…ôd ƒß…ôr fir~…æmograpƒßj to t…ôr~…æ…ô*ision wƒß…ôr…ô sƒß…ô pr~…æaj…ôd r~…æ…ôadi≈ã ror~…æ…ôs in tƒß…ô t*n dramas ¶ƒß…ô…ôs…ô in tƒß…ô trap (****) and guardian: tƒß…ô r~…æon…ôr~…æj and gr…ôat god (****-****). u sur~…æit nu r~…æipun ******(***,kim go …ôun,********* - )******. u kawr~…æaƒß niza (ami ¶unus ƒß…ônaj tu sur~…æit.***) u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ƒß…ônaj tu sur~…æit.***)
